name: debrix
description: Local AI agent debugger for Codex — MCP tools + debrix-debug / debrix-instrument skills. Requires Debrix desktop running (MCP http://127.0.0.1:17419/mcp).

interface.shortDescription: Local AI agent debugger — traces, failures, prompts
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the Debrix desktop app to list traces, inspect failed runs, read span messages, and run local queries via MCP. Keep Debrix running so MCP on http://127.0.0.1:17419/mcp stays available.
defaultPrompt: Read the latest failed Debrix trace and explain the failure
List recent Debrix traces for my agent
Find error spans in the last hour
